_note: Locale-aware video transcripts for the 6 use-case explainer videos. Keyed by the same {key} used in USE_CASE_VIDEO_KEY (lib/use-cases / app/[locale]/(public)/use-cases/[slug]/UseCaseClient.tsx). Rendered inside a collapsed <details> below each UseCaseVideo so the text is crawlable by Google (indexes inside closed details) without polluting the visual hero rhythm. Locale picker: zh → cn, otherwise → en.

dtc.en:
Scale DTC Social Content with Curify

Turn one product photo into hundreds of high-quality, watermark-free visuals in seconds — across multiple styles and formats.

Built for global social platforms with ready-to-use templates, automated scheduling, and API support for batch operations.

Reduce design costs, scale content production, and accelerate overseas growth with AI-powered creative automation.
dtc.cn:
用 Curify，轻松解决跨境 DTC 社媒素材难题
一张实拍图秒出百款高清场景图
多风格全覆盖，无水印极速出图

适配海外主流社媒，自带专属模板
智能定时发布，全域精准曝光

精简设计拉高投产，套餐灵活控本增效
支持 API 批量运营
低成本量产海量视觉，出海引流快人一步

seo.en:
Curify — One Engine for Scalable Content and Programmatic SEO.

Turn one idea into posters, flashcards, illustrations, multilingual dialogues, and more — generated instantly at scale. Produce original, commercial-ready content with no copyright concerns.

Built for programmatic SEO from end to end. Generate structured pages, visual assets, internal links, and long-tail keyword content automatically to accelerate indexing and build sustainable organic traffic.

Flexible deployment across cloud, on-premise, and API. Designed for education, brands, DTC, affiliate, and vertical content platforms — enabling low-cost, large-scale content production and faster growth.
seo.cn:
Curify，一套引擎搞定规模化内容与 SEO 建站难题

一个灵感秒变全场景商用资产
一题多解矩阵生成，海报 / 闪卡 / 插画 / 多语种对话一键出
原创素材无版权顾虑，全品类内容极速落地

程序化 SEO 建站全链路适配
自带枢纽辐射架构，批量生成主图、结构化页面与全自动内链
长尾词页面快速收录，打造稳定流量矩阵

多元场景灵活部署，云端 / 本地 / API 全支持
教育、品牌、DTC、返利站、垂直门户全覆盖
低成本规模化量产，内容与流量双增长快人一步

publisher.en:
Curify accelerates educational content creation with AI. What once took illustrators and production teams months can now be created in minutes.

Generate large volumes of learning content quickly, consistently, and at scale, keep a unified visual style across every format. Bilingual learning materials and social media assets all from the same creative system, create multilingual content with ease.

Choose from a growing library of educational templates covering language learning, science, culture, travel and early education. Flexible partnership options include AI engine licensing, content subscriptions and API integration.

Scale with Curify.
publisher.cn:
Curify，为教育内容创作按下加速键。

传统创作耗时久效率低，插画师三个月工作量，借助 Curify 智能引擎，短时即可批量完成。

统一 IP 画风，一套内容适配词汇卡、教学海报、社交配图等场景，实现全域复用。

支持中英、英西、英日、英韩五大语种，轻松制作双语内容，节省翻译成本。

多款主题模板全覆盖，内容一键多格式生成，适配各类教育出版需求。

可选择引擎授权、内容订阅合作，亦可开放 API 接口,高效打造优质教育内容。

parents.en:
I'd like to introduce Curify, a great platform for learning with your kids.

On Curify, you can make lovely flashcards to guide children's early education, generate and bulk download various vocabulary cards with one click, and play the cards with audio so your kid can listen by themselves.

Learn today with Curify!
parents.cn:
Curify 专为学习场景打造实用功能。

家长批量制作童趣单词卡，轻松陪伴孩子语言启蒙;教师一键生成各类教学词卡，高效备课省心省力;学生也能快速整理词汇清单。

软件支持一键生成朗读音频、批量下载词卡，快速制作优质学习资料，彻底告别繁琐低效的整理工作。

creators.en:
I'd like to introduce Curify for expressing yourself and embracing a healthy life!

When traveling, easily design travel plans, packing lists and delicate journals. For sports fans, create sports star posters, athlete profiles and basketball movement diagrams in one click.

You can also explore your personality, generate exclusive character portraits and lifestyle guides.

Express yourself with Curify!

design.en:
I'd like to introduce Curify, a platform for creating professional-quality artworks!

With Curify, you can make e-commerce detail pages and commercial posters with ease, design idol posters, movie visuals and promotional graphics freely, generate character posters, creator introductions and anime group artworks.

Bring your ideas to life with Curify!

marketer.en:
Hello, everyone. Today, I'll quickly walk you through curify AI's full-funnel growth engine, which covers content creation and omni-channel traffic attraction in one stop.

The top inspiration engine leverages top-tier image models like Nano Banana. You can generate hundreds of visual materials in batches via prompts, boosting content output efficiency by 10 to 50 times directly.

It features a Pinterest-style inspiration feed with intelligent recommendations from hundreds of thousands of tags to maximize click-through rates and retain users effectively.

Supporting SEO blogs enable secondary content accumulation with one-click automatic distribution to overseas platforms, including Facebook and X.

Content creation, exposure, recreation, and distribution form a self-reinforcing growth flywheel. One single tool delivers sustainable long-term traffic growth.
marketer.cn:
大家好，今天带大家快速看懂 Curify AI 全漏斗增长引擎，一站式搞定内容生产与全域引流。

顶部灵感引擎依托 Nano Banana 等顶级图片模型，提示词批量生成数百张视觉素材，内容产出直接提升 10-50 倍。

类 Pinterest 灵感信息流，数十万标签智能推荐，最大化点击率，深度留住用户。

配套 SEO 博客二次沉淀内容，一键自动分发 Facebook、X 等海外平台。

内容、曝光、再创作、分发形成增长飞轮，一套工具实现长效流量增长！

general.en:
My name is Jay. I'd like to introduce our Curify website.

Curify is a platform to get inspirations, express yourself visually, and create content. Whether you're a parent who wants to teach your kids science and vocabulary, a content creator who wants to publish your daily routines and travel plans, or a professional designer who wants to explore different styles and get inspired — you can find great value from the Curify website.

I want to talk about two main features of Curify.

The first is remixing. Let's look at one travel template. In the travel template, we can easily generate beautiful travel maps by simply entering the destination and the travel period.

Suppose my next destination is Dubai, and I want to travel between July 1st and the 5th. It generates a beautiful-looking "Dubai Summer Adventure." This adventure map has day-to-day travel planning, places to visit like the Palm Islands, and things to do — like taking a camel ride and drinking some Arabic coffee. Great. Looking forward to my next trip.

The next feature I want to introduce is search. Search is a great way to explore under a certain concept. I want to learn about music, so here on Curify we have jazz, we have different music instruments, and we have movies like La La Land.

Great. Enjoy your time with Curify.
